text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
42 
PRCNG_EXCPTN_CD 
LABEL: 
Pricing Exception Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates if the PDE was processed by the Part D plan using pricing rules that differ from 
the plan's negotiated price. Most PDEs have missing values, indicating that they were obtained from 
in-network pharmacies. 
SHORT NAME: PRCGEXCD 
LONG NAME: PRCNG_EXCPTN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR
